collected.policy_snippet: personal data includes name, gender, enterprise name, job position, postal and email addresses, phone number, login information (account and password), photos, and certificate information, etc., depending on how you interact with Huawei
collected.purpose: Creating an account, fulfilling service requests, providing technical support, and managing user interactions

stored.policy_snippet: We will retain your personal information for no longer than is necessary for the purposes stated in this Policy
stored.purpose: Maintaining transaction records, improving products/services, and ensuring system security

retention_policy.policy_snippet_deletion: After you deregister your account, we will stop providing you with products and services through your account and delete your relevant personal data

shared.policy_snippet: Huawei shares your personal data with other partners, as described in this Policy, when services are provided by partners authorized by Huawei
shared.purpose: Providing services, fulfilling contracts, and complying with legal obligations

physical_data.overall_privacy_risk_description: Physical data such as photos may be collected, stored, shared with third parties, and transferred internationally, posing risks of unauthorized access, misuse, or exposure if not adequately protected.

data_minimization.reasoning: The policy does not provide specific limits on data collection or justify why each type of data is necessary, only stating general purposes for data collection.
